title: anneslia gracilis
intro: Anneslia gracilis, also known as Indian gentian or long gentian, is a perennial plant species in the family Gentianaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anneslia gracilis include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Anneslia gracilis is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
